source_name: MPC observation histories (via astroquery.mpc) + ALeRCE bogus-object histories
instrument: Multi-instrument -- MPC-aggregated ground-based astrometry for known_object/main_belt_asteroid/neo_candidate/other_solar_system classes; ZTF (via ALeRCE broker) for stellar_artifact class
cadence: Per-designation MPC observation history (irregular, real observation cadence) for 4 classes; ALeRCE ZTF alert history cadence for stellar_artifact class
band_or_frequency: Mixed -- multi-band MPC astrometric history; ZTF g/r/i for ALeRCE-sourced artifact sequences
data_product_type: Tokenized observation sequences (RA, Dec, magnitude, time, filter per observation) for Tier 3 Transformer multi-class classification (known_object/main_belt_asteroid/neo_candidate/other_solar_system/stellar_artifact)
license: Not independently verified in project records. MPC and ALeRCE both publish data for public research use; no explicit license file or terms-of-use document was located during this manifest's creation.
label_source: Five-class label policy approved by Jerome W. Lindsey III on 2026-06-10: MPC-confirmed known_object/main_belt_asteroid/neo_candidate/other_solar_system designations, plus ALeRCE high-confidence bogus ZTF object histories for stellar_artifact
preprocessing_version: Fifth pilot run (post-v0.87.5, 2026-06-13), executed via Skills/run_tier3_pilot.py: MPC acquisition collected 50 sequences/class across 4 classes in 3m49s; ALeRCE collected 50 stellar_artifact sequences (329 observations, 150 queried); Skills/build_sequence_dataset.py built designation-grouped train/calibration/test splits, consumed by Skills/train_tier3_transformer.py to produce models/tier3_transformer.pt (best epoch 17/30, val_macro_f1=0.9400)
known_caveats: This is the real data behind the currently-trained and calibrated models/tier3_transformer.pt (T1-D KPI gate passed 2026-06-14). The checksum field cites mpc_sequences.json only (schema allows one checksum); alerce_artifacts.json's independent sha256 is b319301edc21d50df9d6fa69f5859a83aa92c6aee04762b8250cc03f2214a778, confirmed 2026-07-11.

Confirmed real record counts by direct inspection 2026-07-11: mpc_sequences.json has 200 entries (50 per class x 4 classes), alerce_artifacts.json has 50 entries, splits/{train,calibration,test}.csv total 250 data rows (176+36+41 lines including headers) -- all matching data/sequences/pilot/tier3_training_report.json's combined_class_counts (50 per class x 5 classes = 250) exactly.

IMPORTANT -- do not confuse with superseded files: data/sequences/mpc_pilot.json and data/sequences/alerce_artifact_pilot.json (top level, dated 2026-06-10) are from the FIRST, FAILED pilot attempt documented in CLAUDE.md's T1-A history (28 duplicate comet rows, only 172 unique objects, 103 zero-result MPC queries suppressed as failures) -- confirmed by direct inspection: mpc_pilot.json has 0 entries and every query_log status is 'insufficient_observations'. This manifest's dataset_id and local_path point to the tier3_pilot_v2/ directory specifically to avoid this confusion for future agents.

data/sequences/tier3_pilot_v2/ also contains ~43 Dropbox 'conflicted copy' files (~2.6MB, from a 2026-06-11 sync conflict) alongside the real files listed in local_path; these conflicted copies are not part of this dataset and were not used in training.
